```

Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|H25&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|H26&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|H28&_include=Condition:patient
```

**Explanation:**

| Query | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| SNOMED `193570009` | Cataract (disorder) — broad SNOMED CT concept |
| ICD-10-CM `H25` | Age-related cataract (includes H25.0–H25.9) |
| ICD-10-CM `H26` | Other cataract (includes H26.0–H26.9) |
| ICD-10-CM `H28` | Cataract in diseases classified elsewhere |

- `_include=Condition:patient` fetches the associated **Patient** resources in the same bundle response.
- ICD-10 codes `H25`, `H26`, and `H28` use **prefix matching** to capture all subcategory codes (e.g., H25.9, H26.10, etc.) — note that not all FHIR servers support prefix/wildcard matching on code; you may need to enumerate specific codes depending on server capability.

This SNOMED CT code precisely captures the defining surgical intervention for cataracts:
